title: 信息图可视化设计
description: {"type":"infographic poster","style":"cute flat vector illustration, cozy, warm, soft shading, {argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"pastel Morandi colors, soft pinks, purples, and warm tones\"}","character":"{argum
prompt_raw: {"type":"infographic poster","style":"cute flat vector illustration, cozy, warm, soft shading, {argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"pastel Morandi colors, soft pinks, purples, and warm tones\"}","character":"{argument name=\"character description\" default=\"young woman with shoulder-length brown hair wearing a pinkish-purple shirt\"}","layout":{"structure":"4 rows, 3 columns. Top row is a merged header. Rows 2-4 contain 9 individual panels.","header":{"title":"{argument name=\"main title\" default=\"情绪不好了？\"}","subtitle":"{argument name=\"subtitle\" default=\"8个让你瞬间变好的方法\"}","sub_subtitle":"写给焦虑的你，快来看看","visual":"character hugging herself, surrounded by yellow sparkles and hearts"},"grid_panels":[{"id":1,"title":"1. 深呼吸","text":"调节神经，缓解紧张情绪。","visual":"character with eyes closed, smiling, surrounded by clouds"},{"id":2,"title":"2. 去户外散步","text":"接触自然，让心静下来。","visual":"character walking outdoors among green trees and bushes"},{"id":3,"title":"3. 写情绪日记","text":"把烦恼写下，大脑会更轻松。","visual":"character sitting at a desk writing in a notebook with a pen, floating hearts"},{"id":4,"title":"4. 抱抱自己","text":"给予自己温暖和安慰。","visual":"character hugging herself with eyes closed, floating hearts"},{"id":5,"title":"5. 听听音乐","text":"让舒缓的旋律治愈心灵。","visual":"character wearing large white headphones, eyes closed, floating colorful music notes"},{"id":6,"title":"6. 找人倾诉","text":"分享你的烦恼，让压力释放。","visual":"character holding a smartphone, talking to another similar-looking girl, floating hearts"},{"id":7,"title":"7. 看看天空","text":"感受天空的辽阔，让心情变好。","visual":"character looking up at a blue sky with white clouds and sparkles"},{"id":8,"title":"8. 冥想","text":"专注于呼吸，找回内心的宁静。","visual":"an open notebook, a pen, and a pink flower on a desk"},{"id":9,"title":"none","text":"{argument name=\"footer text\" default=\"转发收藏，每天都要关爱自己！\"}","visual":"character sitting cross-legged in a meditation pose, eyes closed, with a glowing halo behind her head"}]}}
prompt_preview: {"type":"infographic poster","style":"cute flat vector illustration, cozy, warm, soft shading, {argument name=\"color palette\" default=\"pastel Morandi colors, soft pinks, purples, and warm tones\"}","character":"{argum
prompt_display_cn:
案例「type」属于信息图/结构图。这是一张信息图/结构图类案例，重点不是单一画面主体，而是把主题内容拆成清晰模块，用标题、图标、箭头、分区、编号、标签和说明文字组织信息。适合改成知识科普、人物关系、流程图、城市地图、产品说明、攻略指南等高信息密度视觉。

原始提示词要点：这是一条结构化提示词，原文使用 JSON/参数协议描述画面。案例类型为“信息图 海报”，核心由 type, style, character, layout 等部分组成。展示层建议不要直接暴露原始 JSON，而应转译为中文说明与可填空模板，方便用户理解画面结构、替换主题、复用版式。
prompt_template_cn:
制作一张【主题】的信息图/结构图。

画面定位：
面向【目标读者】，用于【使用场景】，整体要求信息清楚、层级明确、视觉有吸引力。

主体内容：
以【核心对象/中心主题】为视觉中心，周围分成【模块数量】个信息模块，分别展示【模块1】、【模块2】、【模块3】、【模块4】等内容。

版式结构：
采用【版式结构】，使用清晰的标题区、分区框、箭头连线、编号标签、图标和简短说明文字组织信息。重要内容要突出，次要内容保持整齐。

视觉风格：
整体风格为【视觉风格】，背景为【背景样式】，配色使用【主色调】，图形元素保持统一。

文字要求：
所有需要显示的文字使用【文字语言】，标题和标签清晰可读，避免乱码、错字和过度拥挤。

输出要求：
画面比例为【画面比例】，适合用于【发布渠道/用途】。
